judgment.summary: High-growth, highly profitable cybersecurity company with strong cash flow and a solid balance sheet, though trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 32.6%; next earnings date is 2026-08-05.
positives: Revenue growth 20.1% YoY and earnings growth 28.6% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 27.5% and operating margin 31.3% demonstrate excellent profitability and operational efficiency.
Return on equity 132.4% is exceptionally high, showing effective use of shareholder capital.
Total debt $567.20M vs. Total cash $3.29B indicates a very healthy balance sheet with ample liquidity.
Free cash flow $1.81B TTM provides significant financial flexibility.
negatives: Trailing P/E 50.58 and Forward P/E 37.95 suggest a premium valuation.
PEG ratio 2.88 indicates that the stock price may be ahead of its earnings growth.
Price/Book 96.44 and Price/Sales 13.40 are high, reflecting market expectations for continued growth.
Analyst consensus is 'hold' with a mean target price below the current trading level.

news.paragraph: Fortinet announced a partnership with NVIDIA to enhance real-time AI data security, a move that could bolster its position in the rapidly growing AI infrastructure market. This collaboration addresses a critical need for secure AI deployment and may drive future revenue streams. Traders should monitor how this partnership impacts competitive dynamics and customer adoption in the cybersecurity space.

headlines.title: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Partners with Fortinet to Secure AI Data in Real Time

examples.body: After a sharp selloff in Software ($IGV) at the market open, $MSFT $ORCL $PANW $FTNT made a sharp reversal rebound.
Looking for adds onto my starter positions: $PODD $ZTS Possible small add onto starter position: $RXRX position Moving up stops/potentially locking in some: $F…
$FTNT favors rally targeting 140 or higher in bullish weekly sequence after it broke above February-2025 high. It should remain supported in 3 , 7 or 11 swings…
